---
title: "Education Conditional Grant Simulator"
description: "Interactive tool for exploring how Nepal's education conditional grant formula allocates funds across local governments."
categories: [Education, Simulation]
image: "/tools/education-simulator/cover.png"
format:
  html:
    css: /styles.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    include-before-body: "/nav.html"
---

::: {.tool-fullscreen}
```{=html}
<iframe 
  src="https://saroj-pathak-education-simulator.share.connect.posit.cloud/" 
  width="100%" 
  height="900" 
  style="border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>
```
:::
